name: Jevon Teul
title: Entry Level in Computer Science
location: Kendall Village, Stann Creek District, Belize
summary: Entry-level developer with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications and managing administrative workflows in clinical settings. Comfortable across the stack — from database schema to front-end UI — with an eye toward systems that solve real problems.

bullets: Manage end-to-end client intake workflow: referrals → clinician matching → chart creation in SimplePractice
Coordinate between clinicians, clients, and management to ensure smooth onboarding
Built Excel tracking sheets to monitor referral status and staff hours
Draft and manage professional correspondence with clients and referral sources
Designed and deployed a full-stack Captive Wildlife Permit Management System
Built role-based dashboards, sortable tables, inspection calendar, and permit status tracking
Integrated email notifications via Resend API; hosted on Render with Supabase backend
Delivered a working production system used by department staff

projects.name: Captive Wildlife Permit System
projects.description: Production system for the Belize Forestry Department managing the full permit lifecycle. Features dashboard charts, document uploads, inspection scheduling, and paginated data tables.

projects.name: GoBites — Food Delivery App
projects.description: Role-based food delivery platform with seven distinct user screens. Architected the TypeScript/Express backend and coordinated frontend integration across the team.
